scope_summary: Correct the project Luna reasoning profile after a pre-start runtime rejection.
Attempt to dispatch Luna for a deterministic availability check.
constraints: No commands or files were executed by Luna.
Runtime rejection occurred before agent execution.
outcome_summary: Runtime rejected the built-in launcher before agent execution: unsupported reasoning value 'minimal' for gpt-5.6-luna-1p-codexswic-ev3; supported values are none, low, medium, high, and xhigh.
notes: Pre-start rejection; no started event exists because Luna never began execution.

scope_summary: Correct the project Luna reasoning profile after a pre-start runtime rejection.
commands: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe - (parse all project TOML and validate full agent ledger against JSON Schema)
outcome_summary: Changed Luna routing from minimal to none, recorded the pre-start availability failure, and validated four TOML files plus the full eight-event agent ledger.
notes: The current already-open built-in Luna launcher may remain pinned to minimal independently of the project profile; a new session or custom-profile reload may be required.

scope_summary: Verify the human-completed AFHQ early-stop 20k checkpoint and run the approved unified raw quick-200 comparison against baseline and always-on REPA.
constraints: No roadmap changes, full-1000 evaluation, sampler or CFG ablations, or push.
Use only the three raw 20k checkpoints under the established quick protocol.
Do not rewrite prior ledger events or checkpoints.
commands: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe - (validate both JSONL ledgers against their schemas)
outcome_summary: Unified raw quick-200 completed with unchanged checkpoints. Early-stop improved FID/KID over baseline and always-on REPA, while baseline retained higher precision and recall; no selection, freeze, or full-1000 decision was made.
notes: A minimal backwards-compatible evaluator fix added configurable reference_variant so the approved three-checkpoint raw-20k comparison could run without an unapproved 10k participant. Targeted tests passed; generated evaluation outputs remain ignored.
